name: The Wine Cellar
description: A vaulted underground room with rows of dusty bottles. The air is cold and the light never reaches the far wall.

name: The Conservatory
description: Glass walls sweating with humidity, filled with overgrown tropical plants. Something large moves in the undergrowth.

name: The Attic Study
description: Books stacked to the rafters, a single lamp burning over a locked desk. The stairs creak in a language only some understand.

name: The Lake Jetty
description: A rotting wooden pier extending into black water. Fog sits motionless above the surface at all hours.

name: The Portrait Gallery
description: A long corridor where the painted eyes follow movement. The floorboards have been recently scrubbed but still leave stains.

name: The Clock Tower
description: The mechanism has not stopped since 1887. The room smells of iron and something sweeter. The view from the top shows everything.
